# Obsidian Vault Structure

## Notes and Folders

An Obsidian vault is a directory of plain Markdown files. Subdirectories become folder hierarchies. Files can link to each other with `[[wikilink]]` syntax.

## Front Matter

### YAML Syntax

Front matter is a YAML block delimited by `---` at the top of a file. Obsidian reads `tags`, `aliases`, and any custom key-value pairs from it.

### Aliases

Aliases allow a note to be referenced by multiple names in wikilinks without renaming the file itself.
